Data Engineer — 6 years

Pipeline & Orchestration:
• Apache Spark — large-scale batch ETL/ELT, PySpark, DataFrame API, Spark SQL
• Apache Kafka — streaming ingestion, consumer groups, schema registry, compaction
• Apache Airflow — DAG authoring, SLA alerts, retry policies, XCom patterns
• dbt — transformation modeling, testing, documentation, lineage graphs

Storage & Warehousing:
• Snowflake, BigQuery, Redshift — data warehouse design, cost optimization
• Delta Lake, Iceberg — ACID transactions, time-travel, partition pruning on S3/GCS

Modeling & Quality:
• Dimensional modeling — Kimball star schema, slowly changing dimensions
• Data quality — schema validation, row count checks, freshness monitoring, observability
• SQL, Python — transformation logic, scripting, tooling
